summary: Completed testing of iOS Evidence Upload flow for BedekPro. All backend APIs pass (9/9 tests). Fixed critical thumbnail loading issue by adding /api prefix to upload URLs for proper ingress routing. Frontend EvidenceFirstAddFinding component verified working with iOS-safe capture attributes.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Static file serving for uploads was not routed through /api prefix, causing thumbnails to return HTML instead of images
Fixed: Frontend buildFullUrl now normalizes old /uploads/ paths to /api/uploads/ for backward compatibility
updated_files: /app/backend/services/storage_service.py - Changed upload URLs to use /api/uploads/ prefix
/app/frontend/src/components/EvidenceFirstAddFinding.js - Updated buildFullUrl to handle both old and new URL formats
seed_data_creation: Test images created during pytest runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Evidence upload flow is fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_evidence_upload.py cover: upload success, invalid inspection, missing file, unauthorized access, pending evidence retrieval, evidence finding creation. Frontend component EvidenceFirstAddFinding has iOS-safe capture attributes (accept=image/*, capture=environment). Thumbnails now load correctly via /api/uploads/ path.

Frontend thumbnail display.note: Fixed URL routing to use /api/uploads/ prefix

Page refresh persistence.note: Pending evidence restored from server on component mount

fixes_applied.reason: Static files were not being served through backend, causing thumbnails to return HTML
URLs need /api prefix for proper routing through Kubernetes ingress
Backward compatibility for existing media records with old URL format
